scripts.ready: pnpm run check && pnpm run test && pnpm run build
scripts.check: pnpm --filter @archive-management/frontend-core run check && pnpm --filter @archive-management/web run check
scripts.check:fix: pnpm --filter @archive-management/frontend-core run check:fix && pnpm --filter @archive-management/web run check:fix
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @archive-management/frontend-core run test && pnpm --filter @archive-management/web run test
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @archive-management/frontend-core run build && pnpm --filter @archive-management/web run build
